task_yaml.task:
I want to make a collection poster for 3 favorite Bilibili videos to
hang at my desk:

  BV1tt411a7Tt
  BV1Vt411X7sa
  BV1ev411s7QU

The poster should show each video's cover thumbnail, title, UP主
(uploader), and duration.

For data collection, use the browser flow — open each Bilibili video
page in chromium and take a screenshot, use curl to fetch the HTML,
and use htmlq to extract the title, UP主, cover image URL, and
duration. Also download the cover images with curl.

Use inkscape to create a composite SVG arranging all 3 covers and
their info as a single poster, then export a PNG at least 800px wide.
All 3 videos in one poster — don't split into 3 files.

Put artifacts under /tmp_workspace/results/. Save the poster source as
poster.svg and the exported PNG as poster.png. Place the 3 cover
images in a thumbs/ subdirectory named by BV number; place the 3
browser screenshots in a browser_screenshots/ subdirectory, also named
by BV number.

Format each video's duration as "Xm Ys" (e.g. "3m 45s"), and mark the
longest video with a label (like ★ or "最长") so it's immediately
obvious.

When done, just tell me which video is the longest.
